channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 12th March
item.description:
Customer has reported a pothole and has given the approx location on in the Northbound direction.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By village pond water covered so cant be seen, cars are catching tyres in it, 12th March
item.description:
On road by village pond
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blacksmiths Lane, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit parking sign Zone 12 missing, 12th March
item.description:
This street Millbrook Gardens has several permit zone notices fixed to lamp posts. The lamp post marked has not got one and visitors to the apartment block 18-32 Millbrook Gardens have been given penalty notices, as they were not aware that this end of the street is permit parking due to the lack of signage. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Millbrook Gardens, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left over car parts, 12th March
item.description:
Following a car going off the carriageway - roundabout there are a lot of car parts left on the roundabouts grass verge (ditch) abutting Miserden Road- these have been there for many months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Miserden Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 12th March
item.description:
Give Way Sign - Faded 600mm give way sign needs replacing.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Potholes, 12th March
item.description:
There are several large potholes forming in this location that are now forcing avoiding action towards the barriers or cones on the contra flow system. I don't want to have to click on all the holes but suggest you send someone to do a loop around the roadworks from the Shurdington road to the Enstone junction and back again as there are many holes opening up. Some (at the bottom of Crickly Hill) have markings, but many don't. There are some at Nettleton Bottom, some on the south bound side of the section from the air balloon roundabout to the birdlip junction. You really can't miss them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, 12th March
item.description:
Pot hole at the end of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Victoria Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp outside no 10 has been out for a few days, 11th March
item.description:
Street lamp outside no 10 has been out for a few days. It is very dark around here. Sometimes it turns on for a few minutes and flickers and it turns off.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walnut Close, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp on 110861 is out, 11th March
item.description:
Wellington Road, Cheltenham, nr Evesham Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellington Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reduced visibility, 11th March
item.description:
Temporary signs blocking visibility of road users at junction. Dangerous to road users.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Another large pot hole, 11th March
item.description:
It's on the left hand side of Badgeworth Road when you're travelling north, just before you turn right in to The Reddings.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: UK flags and St George’s flags on lamp posts, 11th March
item.description:
Opposite No.38 Hotel on Pittvile Lawn
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellington Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: The traffic light has been vandalised

item.description:

item.description:
Multiple pot holes at junction

item.title: 10/12 inch pothole, 11th March
item.description:
Large and quite deep pothole on LHS carriageway, at end of No. 66 driveway, heading north to top of Springbank Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Springbank Road, Springbank, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac failing along the road, 11th March
item.description:
Multiple reports of this road and haven’t been taken seriously. Causes cars to drive into the middle of the road the avoid broken tarmac. Buses and larger vehicles cause the houses the shake. Newly laid tarmac has already failed and has cause it to form into the pavements
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Whaddon Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree growing towards window and guttering, 11th March
item.description:
On Marle Hill Road near 154 Brunswick Street. The tree is in danger of damaging a window and guttering.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Marle Hill Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Union Jack Flags on lamp posts, 11th March
item.description:
Union Jack flags have been put up from new barn lane from the junction with Albert Rd right along to Swindon Rd and to Tommy Taylor’s lane. I should like to know if these have been put up by the council? Do they have a license? If not please remove them as they have likely been put there to intimidate residents by right-wing political supporters.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadworks sign left behind, 11th March
item.description:
Junction of Chapel Lane and Station Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Green, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor
